nasb.text: Answer me, O Lord, answer me, that this people may know that You, O Lord, are God, and that You have turned their heart back again.”

esv.text: Answer me, O Lord, answer me, that this people may know that you, O Lord, are God, and that you have turned their hearts back.”

cnv.text: 耶和華啊，求你應允我，應允我！使這民知道你耶和華是　神，又知道是你使這民的心再回轉過來的。”

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，求你应允我，应允我，好让众人知道你耶和华是上帝，你要使他们回心转意。”
